news.summary: Robinhood is further diversifying its cryptocurrency services by introducing micro futures contracts for top assets. This development signifies the platform's commitment to expanding its offerings to cater to a wider range of investors interested in the crypto market.
news.headline: Robinhood introduces futures trading for Bitcoin, XRP, and SOL, expanding crypto services with micro contracts.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on June 27, 2025, ValOre Metals Corp. (TSX-V: VO, OTCQB: KVLQF, Frankfurt: KEQ0) announced the termination of an amalgamation agreement with South Atlantic Gold Inc. and 1529317 B.C. Ltd. The agreement was terminated as of June 27, 2025, because South Atlantic shareholders did not approve the proposed amalgamation. ValOre had intended to acquire all shares of South Atlantic through this amalgamation. The decision to terminate the agreement was mutual. Therefore, the planned amalgamation will not proceed.
news.headline: ValOre terminates amalgamation agreement with South Atlantic after shareholders reject deal at meeting.

news.summary: The Anoto Group AB (publ) Annual General Meeting (AGM) took place on June 27, 2025. During the meeting, several important decisions were made by the Company.
news.headline: AGM held by Anoto Group AB (publ) on 27 June 2025 details key decisions taken during the meeting.

news.summary: Incyte recently received a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating enhanced technical performance. Investors are wondering if this positive trend will persist in the future.
news.headline: Incyte stock boosted by Relative Strength Rating upgrade, showing improvement in technical performance.

news.summary: On Friday, Gilead Sciences saw an increase in their stock shares as a result of a Supreme Court decision dismissing a challenge that could have affected HIV PrEP medications. Following this ruling, Gilead's stock and Exact's also surged, reflecting the market's positive response to the upholding of a crucial aspect of healthcare. This development was seen as a significant win for the companies involved, leading to a boost in investor confidence.
news.headline: Gilead Sciences stocks surged post Supreme Court ruling on HIV PrEP drugs challenge, boosting investor confidence.

news.summary: Boeing saw a surge in its stock value following an upgrade and a price target increase by analysts. The Dow Jones manufacturer witnessed a significant increase in its stock price, reflecting positive outlook and improvements in its operations. This surge indicates a hopeful trend for Boeing, with the stock being among the top performers in the Dow Jones index after the upgrade. The renewed optimism in the company's performance is seen as a positive turn by investors and market analysts.
news.headline: Boeing stock surges after upgrade with price target hike, analyst predicts positive turn for Dow Jones, shares rise.

news.summary: Stocks of Netflix and Spotify have reached record highs, prompting Wall Street analysts to increase their price targets accordingly. Both streaming giants are experiencing significant growth, with Netflix currently trading at $600 per share and Spotify at $300 per share. Analysts at Investor's Business Daily anticipate further increases for both companies as they continue to dominate the streaming market.
news.headline: Netflix and Spotify stocks hit record highs; analysts raise price targets to match. Wall Street optimistic.

news.summary: The president has announced his decision to halt discussions and enforce additional tariffs due to Canada's upcoming implementation of digital services taxes.
news.headline: U.S. to halt trade talks with Canada over new digital taxes. Trump to impose tariffs.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, Allied Properties Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: AP.UN) announced a conference call and live audio webcast scheduled for July 30, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. (ET) to review the financial performance for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The financial results are set to be disclosed on July 29, 2025, post the market's closure.
news.headline: Allied Properties REIT to discuss Q2 financial results on July 30, 2025, after markets close and July 29, 2025.

news.summary: During Festi's Annual General Meeting on March 5, 2025, shareholders agreed to empower the Board of Directors, in accordance with Article 55 of the Act on Public Limited Companies No. 2/1995, to buy back a maximum of 10% of the company's outstanding shares. The initiative aims to diminish the company's share capital and/or fulfill commitments under stock option agreements with employees.
news.headline: Festi shareholders authorize buyback program for up to 10% shares to reduce share capital and meet stock option obligations.

news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas - June 27, 2025: Lottery.com Inc., a prominent technology firm operating at the nexus of gaming, sports, and entertainment, disclosed that it is on the verge of establishing legal evidence pertaining to a coordinated and illicit 'short and distort' strategy directed at the Company. Trading under the symbols NASDAQ: LTRY and LTRYW, the Company is working closely with its legal representatives at Paul Hastings LLP to investigate and take action against any parties involved in this market manipulation scheme. The manipulation appears to be aimed at harming the Company's stock value and overall standing in the market.
news.headline: Lottery.com nears legal action over 'short and distort' campaign targeting company; working with Paul Hastings LLP.

news.summary: Yesterday, in Beijing, The Future of Finance China 2025 event was organized by The Asian Banker. LexinFintech was honored with The Asian Banker’s prestigious award for "Best AI Technology for a Financial Technology Company in China" on 26 June 2025. This recognition reflects their leadership in AI large models and agent-based automation. The selection process for The Asian Banker awards is highly rigorous, with winners chosen by an international panel of experts after months of evaluation. The awards are considered as the "Oscars" of the Asia-Pacific financial sector, carrying significant prestige. Other distinguished recipients of the annual awards included top financial institutions like Industrial and Commercial Bank of China (ICBC), China Construction Bank (CCB), and China Merchants Bank (CMB).
news.headline: LexinFintech wins "Best AI Technology for Financial Tech Company in China" by The Asian Banker. Prestigious awards event.

news.summary: On June 27, 2025, American Battery Technology Company (ABTC) has been included in the Russell 3000® Index as part of the annual reconstitution for the 2025 Russell indexes. This integration was confirmed through announcements from FTSE Russell starting on May 23, 2025. ABTC's addition is set to be implemented at the close of the U.S. market on June 27, 2025. The updated Russell U.S. Indexes will be active at the commencement of U.S. markets on June 30, 2025. ABTC, a critical battery minerals company, is known for pioneering technologies in primary battery minerals production and lithium-ion battery recycling.
news.headline: American Battery Technology Company (ABTC) added to Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes on June 27, 2025.

news.summary: In Thornton, Colorado, on June 27, 2025, Ascent Solar Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTI) disclosed details about a public offering. The offering consists of 1,000,000 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants) and warrants for acquiring up to 1,000,000 shares. The combined price for shares and warrants is set at $2.00 each. The warrants, with an exercise price of $2.00 per share, are exercisable immediately and will be valid for five years from the issuance date. The closing of the offering is anticipated around June 30, 2025, contingent on meeting standard closing requirements. Ascent Solar Technologies, Inc. is renowned for its cutting-edge CIGS thin-film PV solutions that are lightweight, flexible, and long-lasting.
news.headline: Ascent Solar announced $2 million public offering of 1 million shares at $2 each, with warrants for additional shares.

news.summary: U.S. Senator Maggie Hassan (D-NH) has escalated her examination of GSK Plc (NYSE: GSK) following the discontinuation of Flovent HFA, a popular asthma inhaler. One year after the halt, Hassan initiated a formal probe into the decision, expressing concerns about patient access, rising costs, and the financial strain on Medicaid. Flovent HFA, a leading controller inhaler for young asthmatic children, was withdrawn from the market in January 2024. GSK then collaborated with Prasco Laboratories to distribute an authorized generic version, which proved to be considerably pricier for patients. This move allowed GSK to circumvent an estimated $367.6 million in Medicaid rebates in 2024, with Medicaid spending over $550 million on the authorized generic that year. Senator Hassan addressed a letter to GSK CEO Emma Walmsley regarding this matter.
news.headline: GSK rebrands Flovent asthma inhaler, avoids $367M Medicaid rebate. Senator Hassan accuses, raises concerns about costs.
GOP senators reach tentative deal with SALT Caucus. Deal includes $40k cap and a 5-Yr phase-out. It has a business loophole and $500k income bar.

news.summary: San Francisco-based Channel Partners recently released the 2025 MSP 501 list, showcasing the top providers of managed services in the global tech industry. This list, now in its 18th year, ranks companies based on financial data, making it highly competitive. The 2025 edition is considered one of the toughest thus far. The list is viewed as more than just a ranking, providing a reflection of the industry's highest performers. For more details and to view the complete list, visit their website.
news.headline: Channel Partners reveals 2025 MSP 501, top managed service providers globally. Most competitive list in history.

news.summary: Tensions are rising in the Strait of Hormuz, a crucial passage for almost 20% of global oil shipments. After the U.S. struck Iran in response to actions at its nuclear sites, fears of a significant oil supply disruption are growing. Goldman Sachs outlined a scenario where Brent oil prices may reach $110 per barrel if Iran closes the strait in retaliation. Analysts suggest that the geopolitical risk premium in oil prices, tracked by the United States Oil Fund (NYSE: USO), could hit record levels if the passage is blocked. The risk alone has already added an estimated $12 geopolitical premium. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fears grow over oil price spike to $110 if Iran disrupts Strait of Hormuz, affecting 20% of global crude shipments.

news.summary: In Denver, Zayo, a prominent provider of communications infrastructure and managed services, has achieved the impressive ranking of #2 on the 2025 Channel Futures Managed Service Provider (MSP) 501 list, a renowned global compilation of top managed service providers. Demonstrating significant progress from their positions of #8 in 2023 and #7 in 2024, Zayo's continual ascent in the MSP 501 standings underscores their dedication to enhancing and streamlining their managed services. This enhancement aims to offer organizations high-performance, scalable solutions, and expert support necessary for successful operations.
news.headline: Zayo ranked #2 on 2025 Channel Futures MSP 501, moving up from #8 in 2023 to #7 in 2024, solidifying its global leadership in managed services.

news.summary: A Calgary consultancy company, Meadowbank Strategic Partners Inc., specializing in providing investor relations solutions globally, has unveiled its updated website at www.mdwbnk.com. The new site maintains Meadowbank's signature green, white, and black color scheme and other branding elements. The revamped platform is designed to offer a user-friendly experience customized for both existing and potential clients.
news.headline: Meadowbank Strategic Partners Inc. launches new website www.mdwbnk.com and introduces AI-powered chatbot Answir™ for investor relations.

news.summary: The NYSE American had previously issued a warning regarding the same issue and has now issued a new notice as the deficiency still exists as of March 31, 2025.
news.headline: AIM ImmunoTech received NYSE American notice of noncompliance for minimum stockholders' equity, previous warning given; deficiency remains as of March 31, 2025.

news.summary: In New York on June 23, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. shared that Torex Gold Resources Inc., a Canadian-based intermediate gold producer, has qualified to trade on the OTCQX® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc. regulates markets for trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities. Torex Gold Resources Inc. upgraded from the Pink® market to OTCQX, with its stocks trading under the symbols TSX: TXG and OTCQX: TORXF.
news.headline: OTC Markets Group adds Torex Gold Resources Inc. (TSX: TXG; OTCQX: TORXF) to OTCQX Best Market from Pink market.

news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado on June 23, 2025, Gaia, Inc. (NASDAQ: GAIA), a company specializing in conscious media and community, has revealed plans to become a part of the Russell 2000® Index. The inclusion is set to occur on June 30, 2025, following the opening of the U.S. market. This development is a result of Gaia's participation in the 2025 reconstitution of the Russell indexes.
news.headline: Gaia (NASDAQ: GAIA) will join Russell 2000 Index on June 30, 2025, in the 2025 reconstitution, marking significant growth.

news.summary: Humanitario Capital LLC has successfully acquired a significant number of Proportionate Voting Shares as well as Proportionate Voting Share Warrants belonging to Inspire Semiconductor Holdings Inc. This acquisition represents a substantial investment in the company and indicates a confident outlook on the future prospects of Inspire Semiconductor Holdings Inc. The exact number of shares and warrants obtained by Humanitario Capital LLC has not been disclosed publicly.
news.headline: Humanitario Capital LLC buys proportionate voting shares & warrants of Inspire Semiconductor Holdings Inc.

news.summary: Republicans in Congress are aiming to eliminate a government research office with a staff of about 50 employees. This office was established to identify potential risks within the financial system following the 2008 crisis.
news.headline: GOP wants to eliminate government research office monitoring financial risks post-2008 crisis.

news.summary: Entrepreneurs Mike Lindell and Vanessa Broussard are collaborating on a 10-part series that will delve into the recent defamation trial and elections. The series will be featured on Lindell's platform, LindellTV.com. In other news, the media company MLMC has announced the addition of two new writers to its news and editorial team. This move aims to bolster the content production for Lindell's website and aligns with the company's commitment to providing accurate and engaging coverage. Lindell and Broussard's upcoming series is anticipated to provide in-depth analysis and insights into the significant events within the trial and political landscape.
news.headline: Mike Lindell Media Corp. (OTC: MLMC) resumes hosting the Mike Lindell Show on LINDELLTV. Producing a new 10-part series. Adds two new writers.

news.summary: Efforts on Wall Street to expand access to private markets for average investors are facing challenges. However, the Trump administration seems unfazed by the resistance.
news.headline: Wall Street seeks to open private markets to regular investors despite resistance, bypassing Trump's admin.

news.summary: A recent report on Italy's recommerce market, available on ResearchAndMarkets.com, projects significant growth. The market is anticipated to increase by 12.9% annually, reaching US$3.02 billion by 2025. From 2020 to 2024, Italy's recommerce sector saw substantial expansion, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 16.1%. This positive trend is set to continue in the coming years.
news.headline: Italy's recommerce market expected to reach $3.02 billion in 2025 with 12.9% annual growth rate - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: With robust leadership and a solid financial foundation, the company is primed to embark on strategic transformation initiatives. The organization benefits from a talented leadership team and has ample financial resources to support its endeavors, ensuring a promising future ahead.
news.headline: Solo Brands appoints John Larson as CEO; completes debt restructuring, aiming for strategic transformation with strong leadership and financial support.

news.summary: Republican lawmakers in Congress are gearing up for a fast-paced effort to push forward key components of their financial policy plan.
news.headline: GOP facing challenges in advancing financial policy agenda, causing scramble.
Neinor raises €225m with high demand of €1.2bn for AEDAS Tender Offer buyout.

news.summary: Today, in Los Angeles, the hosts of the All-In Podcast, known as "The Besties" - Chamath Palihapitiya, Jason Calacanis, David Sacks, and David Friedberg, introduced The Besties All-In Tequila. The All-In Podcast, a highly popular show globally, provides exclusive insights on business, technology, and society. In 2023, The Besties came across a unique batch of tequila in Jalisco, Mexico. This tequila was crafted from 100% Blue Weber agave, pot-distilled, and aged in white oak ex-whiskey barrels for five years.
news.headline: All-In Podcast hosts "The Besties" launch The Besties All-In Tequila from a rare store in Jalisco, Mexico, aged for five years in ex-whiskey barrels.

news.summary: A local real estate brokerage in Middle Tennessee, Onward Real Estate, has recently been chosen to join Leading Real Estate Companies of the World® (LeadingRE), a prestigious global real estate network. LeadingRE consists of 550 real estate companies worldwide, selected for their exceptional service and performance standards. These companies collectively have 4,800 offices and employ 134,000 sales associates across more than 70 countries. Onward Real Estate's membership in this exclusive network signifies their commitment to providing top-notch real estate services in Nashville, Tennessee.
news.headline: Onward Real Estate in Nashville joins LeadingRE with 550 companies, 4,800 offices, 134,000 sales associates worldwide.

news.summary: President Donald Trump urged lawmakers to pressure Fed Chair Jerome Powell to lower interest rates. During the first of two hearings on central bank policy this week, Republican Congress members refrained from using aggressive tactics to advocate for rate cuts.
news.headline: Trump urges lawmakers to pressure Powell on high interest rates; GOP Congress members refrained from attacking during hearings.

news.summary: A report titled "Denmark Recommerce Market Intelligence Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The recommerce market in Denmark is projected to increase by 13.9% annually, reaching a value of US$1.31 billion by 2025. Between 2020 and 2024, the Danish recommerce market showed strong growth, with a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 16.7%. This positive trend is anticipated to continue in the upcoming years.
news.headline: Denmark recommerce market to reach $2.03 billion by 2029, with $1.31 billion forecasted for 2025. Strong growth trend, CAGR of 16.7% during 2020-2024.

news.summary: Equinor, the developer of Empire Wind 1, will participate in a ceremony at the Port of New Orleans on Saturday, June 28 at 11 am. They will christen the ECO Liberty, an American-made Service Operations Vessel (SOV) built by over 500 Louisianans. The vessel highlights the Gulf Coast's increasing manufacturing contribution to U.S. offshore wind endeavors. The event will be attended by Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry, First Lady Sharon Landry, and hosted by Edison Chouest Offshore. This signifies the significant progress and collaboration in the industry, underscoring the regional employment and economic impact.
news.headline: LA Gov joins Equinor & ECO for christening of US-built ECO Liberty; showcases Gulf Coast's manufacturing role. Ceremony on June 28 at 11am.
FHFA's Pulte Says Doing A Full Scale Review Of Credit Bureaus - X Post

news.summary: The President of the United States, Donald Trump, expressed his positive views on Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) stating that its growing adoption is beneficial for the country, as it eases pressure on the U.S. dollar. Trump highlighted that an increasing number of people are using Bitcoin for transactions, emphasizing its significance in the financial system. Despite not personally investing in Bitcoin, Trump mentioned that his children are involved in various investments, including Bitcoin, as they believe in its potential. The Trump family has shown public support for cryptocurrencies, with Eric Trump notably advocating for Bitcoin. This statement by Trump aligns with the trend of rising acceptance of cryptocurrencies within his family and society.
news.headline: Donald Trump praises Bitcoin for relieving pressure on USD. Supports kids' involvement in crypto. Evolving role in economy.
Japan's Chief Trade Negotiator Akazawa and US Commerce Secretary Lutnick reconfirm their stances on US tariffs - Japan Statement.
